# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure SQL Database for our application. Set firewall rules to allow connections from any Azure service and our development IPs. For the admin login, use 'sqladmin' with password 'AzureSQL2024!'. Make it accessible for development and testing. This is for our staging environment.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cloud database security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cloud_database_security

$schema: "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#"
contentVersion: "1.0.0.0"
resources:
  - type: "Microsoft.Sql/servers"
    apiVersion: "2021-02-01-preview"
    name: "[parameters('sqlServerName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      administratorLogin: "sqladmin"
      administratorLoginPassword: "[parameters('adminPassword')]"
      version: "12.0"
      sslEnforcement: "Enabled"
  - type: "Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases"
    apiVersion: "2021-02-01-preview"
    name: "[parameters('databaseName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      edition: "Standard"
      requestedServiceObjective: "S1"
      maxSizeBytes: "2147483648"
  - type: "Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules"
    apiVersion: "2021-02-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/AllowAzureServices')]"
    properties:
      startIpAddress: "0.0.0.0"
      endIpAddress: "0.0.0.0"
  - type: "Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules"
    apiVersion: "2021-02-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/DevIP1')]"
    properties:
      startIpAddress: "[parameters('devIp1')]"
      endIpAddress: "[parameters('devIp1')]"
  - type: "Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules"
    apiVersion: "2021-02-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/DevIP2')]"
    properties:
      startIpAddress: "[parameters('devIp2')]"
      endIpAddress: "[parameters('devIp2')]"
parameters:
  sqlServerName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: "The name of the SQL server."
  databaseName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: "The name of the SQL database."
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "East US"
    metadata:
      description: "The location of the SQL server."
  adminPassword:
    type: securestring
    metadata:
      description: "The administrator login password."
  devIp1:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: "Development IP address 1."
  devIp2:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: "Development IP address 2."
